title: Margin Budget Field
prompt:
Create a production-ready Margin Budget Field using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original numeric field lets a reviewer set a safe margin from 8 to 32 pixels using explicit decrease and increase controls. A vertical peach measure beside the value grows with the selected margin, and a written sentence confirms the selected size. Use a light Bento composition with #F4F5F6 support surface, white field, #ECECEE border, 22px corners, gentle neutral shadow, #111111 text, and #4A4A4F secondary copy. Peach is the only bright accent. Do not use gradients on the field or card.

Use a labelled read-only output, native 44px buttons, descriptive aria-label values, and an aria-live polite status. Click, Enter, and Space must adjust the value. The decrease button must disable at 8 and the increase button at 32, with a text explanation remaining available. Animate the measure with a spring using stiffness 320 and damping 28, and fade the output over 140ms ease-out. State must remain local and deterministic: no timers, random values, storage, remote assets, network requests, or browser globals.

At 320px, the value and controls must remain comfortably tappable; in a large preview, let the field expand without fixed positioning. Preserve tab order, visible 3px focus rings, AA contrast, and labels that communicate the state without color alone. Honor prefers-reduced-motion by snapping the measure and allowing only a short opacity fade. Return complete paste-ready client code, a runnable pure CSS approximation, and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML: <section class="margin-budget"><button aria-label="Decrease margin">−</button><output>16px</output><button aria-label="Increase margin">+</button></section> */
.margin-budget{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;max-width:340px;padding:14px;border-radius:16px;background:#f4f5f6}.margin-budget button{min-width:44px;min-height:44px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;color:#111;font-weight:900}.margin-budget output{flex:1;text-align:center;font-size:24px;font-weight:900}.margin-budget button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.margin-budget *{transition:none}}

demoCode:
(() => {function Demo(){const [v,setV]=React.useState(16);const set=n=>setV(Math.max(8,Math.min(32,n)));return
SAFE MARGIN
{v}px

Safe margin set to {v} pixels.

}return ;})()
